summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 1 Specialist Mobile Workflow on mobile viewport (390x844). All features working correctly: specialist login, field dashboard with stats/captures list, visit prep checklist, 5-step venue capture wizard, draft saving, resume editing, and role protection. Backend API tests all passed (11/11).

specialist_login.detail: specialist@venuloq.in / test123 logs in successfully, redirects to /team/dashboard

team_welcome_quick_actions.detail: TeamWelcome shows 'Field Captures' and 'New Venue Capture' quick action buttons

field_dashboard.detail: SpecialistDashboard at /team/field renders with greeting 'Hi, Arjun', stats (Drafts/Submitted/Sent Back), 'New Venue Capture' button, and 'My Captures' list

stats_display.detail: Stats show correct counts - Drafts: 1, Submitted: 2, Sent Back: 0. Stats are clickable to filter captures list

captures_list.detail: Captures list shows venue cards with name, location, owner, status badge, and completeness percentage

visit_prep_screen.detail: /team/field/prep shows 4 checklist sections: Information to Collect, Commercial Questions, Media Guidance, Documents/Proofs with mandatory vs optional indicators

venue_capture_form_5_steps.detail: 5-step wizard at /team/field/capture/new: Basics → Location → Capacity & Price → Photos → Notes & Outcome. All steps render correctly with proper fields

step_1_basics.detail: Venue name, venue type pills, owner name, phone, email, indoor/outdoor selection

step_2_location.detail: City, locality, full address, GPS capture button

step_3_capacity_price.detail: Min/max guests, price per plate range

step_4_photos.detail: Photo upload button, Photo Guide checklist (Facade, Main hall, Stage, Outdoor)

step_5_notes_outcome.detail: Owner interest level (Hot/Warm/Cold/Not Interested), meeting outcome options, notes field, follow-up date, decision-maker question, Submit for Review button

save_draft.detail: Save Draft button creates draft via POST /api/acquisitions/, shows 'Draft created' toast, draft appears in captures list with 'Draft' status

resume_editing.detail: Clicking draft card navigates to /team/field/capture/{acq_id}, form shows 'Edit Capture' title and is pre-filled with draft data

role_protection_customer.detail: Customer role redirected to /team/login when trying to access /team/field

role_protection_api.detail: Customer role gets 403 when trying to POST /api/acquisitions/

critical_code_review_comments: TeamApp.js lines 154-157: Field workflow routes correctly configured with role protection for venue_specialist and admin
SpecialistDashboard.js: Well-structured mobile-first dashboard with stats, captures list, and proper data-testid attributes
VisitPrepScreen.js: Clean checklist UI with mandatory/optional indicators and 'Start Venue Capture' CTA
VenueCaptureForm.js: 5-step wizard with proper form validation, save draft, and submit for review functionality
acquisitions.py: Comprehensive API with CRUD, status transitions, completeness calculation, and role-based access control
seed_data_creation: Created test acquisitions during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Specialist Mobile Workflow fully tested and working. Routes: /team/field (dashboard), /team/field/prep (visit prep), /team/field/capture/new (new capture), /team/field/capture/{id} (edit). Backend acquisitions API at /api/acquisitions/ with CRUD, status transitions, and stats. Role protection working for venue_specialist and admin roles only.
